input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.4.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.4.3.1
            TITLE: if the accumulator container(s) is not easily accessible during electrical tech inspection,

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.4.3.1: If the Accumulator Container(s) is not easily accessible during Electrical Tech Inspection,
IN.4.3.1 If the Accumulator Container(s) is not easily accessible during Electrical Tech Inspection, 
provide detailed pictures of the internals taken during assembly

final_answer: If the Accumulator Container(s) is not easily accessible during Electrical Tech Inspection, provide detailed pictures of the internals taken during assembly
